goal: Create a Python script scripts/task-stats.py that reads .claude-flow/kanban.json and prints a one-line summary: total tasks, done, failed, pending, total cost. Use argparse with --json flag for JSON output. Include tests in tests/test_task_stats.py.

tree.description: Create scripts/task-stats.py that reads .claude-flow/kanban.json and prints a one-line summary with --json flag support via argparse.
Create tests/test_task_stats.py with unit tests covering normal output, --json flag, missing file error, and edge cases (empty tree, mixed statuses).

children.description: Read scripts/task-stats.py and existing test conventions to understand the interface and patterns
Create tests/test_task_stats.py with imports, importlib loader, fixture data factory, and class structure
Write test for default text output mode verifying summary lines contain total, done, failed, pending, cost
Write test for --json flag verifying parseable JSON output with expected keys
Write test for missing kanban.json file asserting non-zero exit code
Write tests for empty tree {} and mixed-status tree edge cases
Run pytest tests/test_task_stats.py and fix any failures until all tests pass

tree.description: Run all tests, verify lint/style compliance, commit and push to origin/master.
